title: microsorum subhastatum
intro: Microsorum subhastatum, also known as the hastate moss fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to tropical Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microsorum subhastatum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting liver health, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
